name: Detailed Backrooms
description:
Another Backrooms simulator. But each room shows objects, entities, and exits to the next room. Some exits may be hidden.

You can use these commands in any room:

look – re-render the current room description, contents, and exits.

exits – display all currently visible exits from the room.

search – carefully examine the room to reveal hidden details, objects, entities, or hidden exits.

a direction command such as N, S, E, or W – move through a visible exit.

inspect followed by an object or entity – view detailed information about a specific item or entity.

pick up or drop followed by an object – manage inventory.

use followed by an object – activate, consume, or apply an item.

interact followed by an entity – talk, trade, or trigger entity behavior.
creator: Chad GPT
